response.global_analysis: 1. Reference Match: The video contains no vocals during the first 4 minutes and 50 seconds, matching the description. A promotional JOYSOUND voiceover plays at the end, which was transcribed manually as it was not included in the reference lyrics. 2. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are kept completely silent during the instrumental-only fan-art montage, and precisely synchronized to the spoken vocal segments in the final advertisement section.

subtitles.original: アニメにハマって 歌いたくなっちゃった
subtitles.english: I got so into anime, I just had to sing!

subtitles.original: 推しのシーン見ながら カラオケ歌えるなんて
subtitles.english: Singing karaoke while watching my favorite scenes...
